title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・不足物について

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon dashes madly toward the goal as
she strives to go beyond her limits. Her running
captures the crowd's full attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite this victory, she feels as though
something remains outside her grasp, preventing
her from reaching her full potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking won't bring out the answer. So instead,
we set forward on our search for that something
she lacks.
